active_refs.duty: Fenshou identity only: black-red armored male warrior, attacker silhouette, compact forward strike identity anchor.
active_refs.negative_duty: Do not copy original pose, source camera, source background, portrait framing, or use the ref to solve action timing.

active_refs.duty: Shuangji identity only: silver-blue armored female warrior, defender silhouette, face/upper-body identity anchor.
active_refs.negative_duty: Do not copy portrait composition, pose, source camera, static expression, source scene, or use the ref to solve action timing.

excluded_refs.reason: Excluded by default because a third character ref may split Shuangji attention and weaken the brief hit-stop action.
Excluded because a broad scene ref may overload action timing and identity anchoring.
Excluded because K257/K259/K261 media is motion/failure evidence only and would risk copying the sustained-push timing.
Excluded because contact sheets are review evidence only, not active generation input.
Excluded because K260 CUT_A was rejected as primary/edit candidate and risks sustained pressure timing.
Excluded because K260 CUT_B was rejected as primary/edit candidate and still reads as sustained push.
Excluded because K263 is R02a contact/hit-stop only; wall-impact aftermath belongs to R02b.
Excluded because action reference video is action grammar evidence, not active generation input by default.

visual review artifact only; not active input

risk_register: Identity anchors may still pull attention away from action timing.
Two-character close contact can still degrade into sustained pressure or merged bodies.
The split-second hit-stop may be overinterpreted as long slow motion.
Received-force onset may be too weak unless the model preserves center-of-mass displacement.
R02a intentionally excludes wall destruction; a reviewer must confirm this does not undercut continuity into R02b.
K260 evidence shows identity improvement but motion timing failure; do not use K260 cuts as active input.
Future submit, query, download, retry, and resubmit require separate human authorization.
